hypotheses.statement: Next Shorts in farm, insects should outperform cold topics.
animal_memory is the strongest current story shape.
High-view/low-retention Shorts need stronger first-sentence outcomes.
A clearer one-line follow CTA should improve subscribers per 1k views.
Turn top performers into sourced sequence/remake candidates before cold discovery.
Viewer-requested animals should earn more comments and subscribers when packaging is strong.
Favor frame profile close_subject|feed_bright|medium_contrast for stronger click and retention signals.

comment_prompts: Answer this viewer question: Watch the wing movement again. Tomorrow: another animal signal. Is this tiny design more impressive than large-animal survival?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the head movement again. Tomorrow: another animal signal. What part of this feels most impossible?
Answer this viewer question: Did you spot the tail before the reveal? Comment the next animal you want me to decode after bird.
Answer this viewer question: Watch the tail again. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the ears again. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?

visual_policy.rule: Favor the winning visual profile when available; otherwise keep selecting the highest local CTR score while collecting samples.

production_policy.selection_rule: highest autonomy_priority among non-rejected publish_score candidates
